basicInfo.name: STEM Coding Robot Kit BuilderPro
basicInfo.nameZh: STEM编程机器人套装建造者Pro

specifications.battery: AA batteries (not included) / USB power option
features: Visual block-based programming (no coding experience needed)

sellingPoints: Perfect introduction to coding and robotics
No prior experience needed – visual programming
Builds critical thinking and problem-solving skills
Aligned with school STEM curriculums worldwide

aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionEn: Ignite a passion for technology with BuilderPro! This comprehensive STEM kit lets kids build 5 different robots and program them using intuitive visual blocks. No coding experience required – just creativity and curiosity!
aiGeneratedContent.shortDescriptionZh: 用建造者Pro点燃对技术的热情！这套全面的STEM工具包让孩子们可以建造5种不同的机器人，并使用直观的可视化模块进行编程。无需编码经验——只需要创造力和好奇心！

marketingCopy.headlineEn: Code Your Future – STEM Robot Kit BuilderPro
marketingCopy.headlineZh: 编程你的未来——STEM机器人套装建造者Pro
marketingCopy.bodyEn: BuilderPro bridges the gap between play and education seamlessly. Children assemble real electronic circuits, learn computational thinking through visual programming, and watch their creations come to life. With 5 distinct models ranging from walking robots to robotic arms, each build teaches fundamental concepts of engineering, logic, and creativity.
marketingCopy.bodyZh: 建造者Pro无缝连接了游戏与教育之间的鸿沟。孩子们组装真实的电子电路，通过可视化编程学习计算思维，并看着他们的创作活灵活现。从步行机器人到机械臂的5种不同模型，每次组装都教授工程学、逻辑学和创造力的基本概念。
